allow: PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; Set-Location web; npm run dev 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "READY status=$\($r.StatusCode\) length=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "not ready yet" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "dev READY 200"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "not ready" })
